verdict.answer_first: A: opens with the direct core answer, "HTTPS is just HTTP running inside a TLS tunnel" and immediately names the three guarantees; B does the same, but A is slightly tighter.
verdict.decisiveness: A: commits to a clean mental model, "Certificates answer... Diffie-Hellman answers... symmetric AEAD cipher answers..." while B adds a follow-up menu at the end.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on right now because it gives the same practical model with less extra material and fewer digressions.
